seoTitle: Uworra vs Valley View — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Uworra and Valley View. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Uworra vs Valley View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Uworra and Valley View.
heading: Uworra vs Valley View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Uworra, South Australia and Valley View, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Valley View has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Uworra (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Uworra or Valley View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Uworra has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Valley View scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Uworra scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Valley View scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Uworra or Valley View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Valley View has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
